## Study: census-of-coasts

The Census of Coasts: continental-shape metrics over 10,000 worlds — the preregistered baseline the terrain overhaul (Crust, Sculpting) must move.

Seeds 0..10000 × 1 pin set(s); 10000 rows; 0 refusals.
